rulings.Case Title: ANDREA LEUNG VS. DEBRA JONES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 18, 2016, Line 1: PLAINTIFF ANDREA LEUNG'S Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions. GRANTED. No opposition filed. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $585. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA LEUNG VS. DEBRA JONES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling A Response To Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 18, 2016, Line 1: PLAINTIFF ANDREA LEUNG'S Motion For Order Compelling A Response To Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions. GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant shall serve complete verified responses without objections within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $585. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft And/Or Defts Agent To Provide Pltf With A Key To The Front Gate Of The Building
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 18, 2016, Line 2: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S Motion To Compel Defendant And/Or Defendant's Agent To Provide Plaintiff With A Key To The Front Gate Of The Building. GRANTED in part and CONTINUED in part. The motion to compel Defendant to provide plaintiff with a key to the front gate is granted. Defendant shall deliver the key to Plaintiff's counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on July 19, 2016. The motion for sanctions is continued to July 25, 2016 pending Defendant's compliance with the order to provide a copy of the key. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FIRST AMERICAN TRUST, FSB, CO-TRUSTEE OF THE THEA VS. JAMES S ARIAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal And For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 18, 2016, Line 3: PLAINTIFF FIRST AMERICAN TRUST, FSB'S Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal And For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation. GRANTED. Moving party presented evidence supporting a finding of breach of the settlement agreement. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 18, 2016, Line 4: DEFENDANT ZACHARY KIDD'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT; Request For Judicial Notice. Hearing Required. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DALIS CRUZ VELASQUEZ VS. IVAN VALLADARES
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Mpa; Declaration;
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 18, 2016, Line 5: DEFENDANT IVAN VALLADARES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED, moving party failed to shift its burden. No evidence provided (1) that the "delay" in abating the conditions is "without good cause" or (2) that "the conditions were not caused by an act or omission of the tenant," =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GUILLERMO NICOLAS VS. MARIA HERMELINDA PALACIOS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 18, 2016, Line 6: DEFENDANTS MARIA PALACIOS, FRANKLIN PALACIOS, and GRACIELA GAITAN'S Demurrer To Complaint. Sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. SFRO 37.9B(c)(1). =(501/REQ)
